case_title: TURGMAN, SUHAIL vs. LAVERTY, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURGMAN, SUHAIL AS TO DEFENDANT LAVERTY, DAVID DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-18-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-29-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-18-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-18-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND OSC TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-24-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-24-1997, 2ND OSC TO PLTF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND FOR PTLF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR APR-23-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-23-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-30-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
